candidate: L14 QUALITY / PROFITABILITY cross-sectional factor (ROE = net_profit / equity). A GENUINELY NEW canonical factor (Fama-French RMW / Novy-Marx profitability family) NOT in the existing graveyard (which holds value, momentum/EDGE-2, hi52, lowvol63, NAV-MR, dividend run-up H2b, foreign-flow, and the L1-L13 synthesis tracks). Measurement-only, look-ahead-safe, committed-engine ZERO-touch, repo READ-ONLY, ASCII. Tests whether high-ROE (high-quality) liquid BIST names earn a positive market-relative return after realistic D-207 cost.
hypothesis: Cross-sectionally, high-quality (high-ROE) firms outperform low-quality (low/negative-ROE) firms (canonical profitability premium). DEPLOYABLE form: long-only TOP-ROE-tercile in the LIQUID universe, market-relative (vs EW-full), net of realistic D-207 round-trip cost, should be positive and significant with a regime-stable sign.

signal_FROZEN.definition: ROE = net_profit / equity, computed per (symbol, month) from data/clean_universe/fundamentals_2019_2026.parquet; require equity > 0 AND net_profit non-null.
signal_FROZEN.rank_based: Cross-sectional TERCILE sort by ROE each formation month -- RANK-based, so robust to the fat-tailed ROE outliers (tiny-equity denominators); NO winsorization parameter (avoids a tuning knob = avoids p-hacking).
signal_FROZEN.no_price_in_signal: ROE uses net_profit and equity only -- it is a pure profitability/quality signal, ORTHOGONAL to price-based value (pe/pbv/bm/ey) and to the graveyard price/volume factors. This is what makes it a genuinely new factor, not a value re-test.

look_ahead_safety_FROZEN.rule: At formation month M (month-end rebalance date), use ROE from fundamentals month M - LAG_MONTHS (=M-1). The fundamentals panel is a MONTHLY SNAPSHOT (mktval is point-in-time; equity/net_profit step only when a new report is RELEASED -- confirmed by mid-quarter equity jumps), so month-M data is known by end of M; the extra 1-month lag is a conservative buffer against any fiscal-period-vs-release-date attribution ambiguity. Returns are measured over the holding period AFTER the formation date (pmat convention), so no future information enters the position.

universe_FROZEN.liquid: >= 1.0e7 TL trailing-63-trading-day median value_tl at the formation date (D-205 absolute threshold)

portfolio_FROZEN.primary_gate: LIQUID long-only TOP-ROE-tercile, market-relative (vs EW-full monthly), net of D-207 realistic per-stock round-trip cost.
portfolio_FROZEN.corroboration: academic long-minus-short spread (top-tercile minus bottom-tercile) reported but NOT the deploy gate.

cost_FROZEN: D-207 per-stock realistic cost via d204.per_stock_cost_panel(close, value_tl, rebal, quoted_panel=d207_quoted) -- quoted-primary; reused identically from L3. Report realized-cost-bps, breakeven-bps, turnover.

stats_FROZEN.nw_t: Newey-West HAC t on the monthly market-relative series (eng._nw_t).
stats_FROZEN.regime_split: 2022-01-01; sign-stable iff pre- and post-split means share sign.

keep_bar_FROZEN: Deploy-edge <=> PRIMARY (K=1 LIQUID long-tercile) rel-net-after-cost mean > 0 AND |NW-t| >= 2.0 AND regime-sign-stable. All three -> TRADEABLE-EDGE-CANDIDATE (deploy-aday, next step the maintainer). Else -> QUALITY-NOT-TRADEABLE (significance/cost-wall) -> clean archive.

honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.summary: Expect the STRUCTURAL WALL (lab META-BULGU) to most likely bind here too: any gross quality premium that exists is likely concentrated in illiquid microcaps and/or eroded by realistic ~28-46bp liquid round-trip cost, OR insignificant in the liquid universe. Quality DOES have two features that could help vs the graveyard: (a) it is a SLOW-moving signal (financials update quarterly), so monthly re-sorting turnover -- and hence cost drag -- should be LOWER than momentum/reversal; (b) it is a defensive factor that historically pays in down-regimes, which the 2022-01-01 split could expose as sign-UNSTABLE. Net honest call: most likely QUALITY-NOT-TRADEABLE (significance or sign-instability in liquid names), but it is a genuinely untested canonical factor and a clean low-turnover candidate, so the result is worth recording either way. If it surprises and clears the keep-bar, it becomes the program's first deploy-candidate. NO celebration on a null; record whatever the result is. This is ONE pre-registered definition -- no grid sweep over ROE variants (that would be p-hacking).
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.most_likely_verdict: QUALITY-NOT-TRADEABLE (liquid significance/cost-wall or regime sign-instability). Recorded whatever it is.
